renames.rationale: Calls OpenSCManagerW/OpenServiceW/CreateServiceW/ChangeServiceConfig2W; error strings open_sc_manager failed, open_service failed; large install/configure routine.
Strings literally name service_manager::disable_service; uses OpenSCManagerW/OpenServiceW + CloseServiceHandle; logs Failed to send custom control / open service / open service manager.
Tiny 7-instruction stub, only string is bad allocation (duplicated); called from operator_new helper FUN_14002d6b4; matches std::bad_alloc throw thunk.
6-instruction wrapper called from operator_new and other allocators; on failure calls throw_bad_alloc (FUN_14002d4fc) via _CxxThrowException; classic operator_new fallback path.
17-instruction constructor calling __std_exception_copy; no callers in batch; matches MSVC std::exception/runtime_error copy-ctor pattern.
Same shape as 14002d51c: 17-instr __std_exception_copy wrapper, no in-batch callers; MSVC stdexception-derived ctor.
19-instr __std_exception_copy wrapper called from FUN_14002d6f4; MSVC stdexception-derived class ctor (likely runtime_error/logic_error subtype).
17-instr __std_exception_copy wrapper; matches MSVC stdexception-derived copy ctor pattern.
19-instr __std_exception_copy wrapper called from FUN_14002d718; MSVC stdexception-derived class ctor.
Small wrapper calling DeleteCriticalSection; called from two siblings (FUN_14005a5c0, FUN_14005a4d0); destructor for object owning a CRITICAL_SECTION.
